_meta.vertical_focus: Independent commercial-focused HVAC contractors (commercial / commercial+industrial / commercial+light-residential mix). NOT residential-pure shops.
sources_used: downtobid.com city directories (Houston, Dallas, Fort Worth, Austin, San Antonio)
Company About-Us pages (primary source for ownership, founder, founding year, license, service mix)
BBB profiles (license verification, family ownership, founding year)
Procore Network / Bluebook ProView (subcontractor address verification)
PrivSource.com 'Recent HVAC & Mechanical Acquisitions in Texas' list (for exclusion screen)
PitchBook / Mergr / Crunchbase (PE-ownership and acquisition history)
Press releases (Chill Brothers, HB Global, Ambient Enterprises, Direct Energy, PremiStar, Audax/Enviromatic) for acquisition exclusions
Texas Department of Licensing & Regulation (TDLR) ACR license format and class verification
license_classes: TDLR ACR Class A — unlimited tonnage (commercial/industrial — primary target class)
TDLR ACR Class B — up to 25 tons / 1.5M BTU heating (typically residential/light-commercial)

caveats: Truck counts are ESTIMATES based on LinkedIn employee headcount, About-Us 'team of X' references, and revenue-to-fleet heuristics — not direct fleet counts. Confirm via Texas SOS records / on-site recon before high-conviction outreach.
Service mix labels ('commercial', 'commercial+industrial', 'commercial+light-residential', 'mixed') derived from website language and project portfolios.
TDLR ACR license numbers verified to format (TACLA = Class A, TACLB = Class B) where shown on company websites; some companies do not publish license # publicly — left null rather than fabricate.
'License_holder_name' refers to the named Responsible Master / RCO when shown on TDLR or company About page — not the legal entity owner.

ASHRAE TX chapter membership not directly verified per business; would require chapter-by-chapter membership directory pulls (Houston, Dallas, Austin, SA). Defaulted to false unless a company explicitly notes ASHRAE affiliation.

Several large multi-generation independents are included (The Way Companies, Young & Pratt, Berger Engineering, Lochridge Priest, The Porter Company, A.J. Monier, Gillette, Lee Thompson) — these are >150 employees and exceed the 10-50 employee 'small shop' ideal but remain TX-headquartered family/employee-owned independents. Flag for scoring.
Berger Engineering Co. operates as a Texas employee-owned company (100+ employee-owners) — not a single-family holding but explicitly NOT PE-backed. Included as 'independent / ESOP'.
The Way Companies — fourth-generation family-owned, founded 1918 in Houston. Confirmed independent per public ownership records.

Houk Air Conditioning — referenced 'SE Acquisition Sub' in Texas litigation filings suggests possible 2024+ ownership change; flagged for re-verification. Included tentatively as 'independence_verified=false' with note.
Hou-Tex Mechanical and Master AC & Heat are LIGHT-commercial (mostly residential with some office/warehouse work) — included but flagged as 'mixed' rather than 'commercial-pure'.

Texas Central Air, HVAC Express, Lee Air Services, New Balance A/C, Webb Air, Optimal Air Solutions (Trane Comfort Specialist) — all in PE-roll-up exclusion zone or flagged as residential-pure; cross-checked against Chill Brothers acquisition press releases.

Independence verified at website footer + LinkedIn ownership + recent press-release screen (Mergr, PitchBook, PrivSource, ACHR News). Recommend secondary TX SOS registered-agent check before final outreach.

dba_name: Way Service, Ltd. / The Way Companies
independence_notes: Fourth-generation family-owned since 1918. Not on PE acquisition lists (PrivSource, PitchBook, Mergr). Multi-location TX+LA but unified family entity. Larger than 10-50 employee ideal — flagged for scoring.

Family-owned by Kahn family (Charlotte Kahn, President; Josh Kahn, Visionary). WBE certified since 1995. Commercial-exclusive (offices, industrial, healthcare, restaurants, data centers, multi-tenant) since 1974. Not on any PE acquisition list.

Locally owned/operated since 1963; locations in Waco, Temple, Corsicana, Central TX. ~193 employees, ~$83M revenue. Largest mechanical company in Central TX. David Akins, VP. Larger than 10-50 ideal — flag for scoring.

Founded 1922 in West Texas; moved to Austin 1929. Current Owner/President: David Zern (son of Joseph Zern, who was co-owner from 1967). 85+ trained professionals, 825+ years combined team experience. Multi-generation family/partner-owned. Larger team — flag for scoring.

legal_name: The Porter Company / Porter Service Co.
independence_notes: Family-owned since 1945. President: Aaron Richards; CFO: David Sietsema. Serves commercial, semiconductor fab, pharmaceutical, medical, specialty piping. Larger independent — flag for scoring.

Founded 1958 (re-org 1972 by Richard L. Berger). Texas-based employee-owned company (100+ employee-owners), >$50M revenue. NOT PE-backed — explicit ESOP structure. M/WBE certified 2017. Larger than 10-50 ideal — flag for scoring.
Founded 1959 by Vincent Gillette Sr. and Marjorie Gillette. Three-generation family-owned. ~250 employees. Industrial/institutional/govt/commercial. Larger than 10-50 ideal — flag for scoring.

Founded Aug 1972 by Dan Holt. Currently owned by Jeff Holt (2nd gen; brother Mark passed 2019). ~60 employees as of 2025. Commercial-focused: offices, warehouses, manufacturing, pharma labs, malls, schools, churches, hotels.

President: Jeffrey Beyer (commercial HVAC focus); sibling companies Beyer Plumbing (Perry) and Beyer Air Conditioning & Heating (Pat). Three Beyer brothers run three sister companies — all family-owned in San Antonio. Commercial-only for Beyer Mechanical.

Founded 1964, locally owned/operated. 200+ employees. Owner: Patrick Freund (plumbing license M-41299). Serves healthcare, manufacturing, education, hospitality, govt, retail, real estate. Larger than 10-50 ideal — flag for scoring.
Founded 1908 in San Antonio. 117-year history. Full-service mechanical: HVAC, plumbing, process piping, sheet metal. Larger independent — flag for scoring.

50+ years operating ('Your leader in commercial HVAC services in TX'). Commercial/industrial/institutional/government clients only. 24-hr emergency service, energy mgmt, design-build. Independence inferred — not on any acquisition list.
Founded 1977. Woman-owned full-service mechanical contractor, design-build construction, custom HVAC + building automation. TX + OK service. Certified small business. 450+ completed projects.
San Antonio branch founded 2004; parent in Bryan/College Station. Brian Pittman, key principal. Serves AT&T, Northside ISD. Projects up to $14M. Privately owned, not on acquisition lists.
50+ years experience ('Over 50 Years' per About page). New Braunfels-based residential & commercial AC/heating. Independent — not on acquisition lists.
125+ years combined team experience. Serves New Braunfels, San Antonio, Austin, IH-35 corridor. Privately owned independent.
Founded 2016 by Justin Lewis (15+ yrs HVAC-R). Commercial HVAC + refrigeration, Central TX. Independent.
Founded 1972. Family-owned + veteran-owned. Mixed residential + commercial (Class B license means equipment ≤25 tons / 1.5M BTU — light commercial only). Independent.

legal_name: Mission Plumbing Heating & Air Conditioning Co., Inc.
independence_notes: Multi-generation family-owned since 1956. President: Joseph E. Bonugli. 130+ yrs combined team experience. Master Plumber + Master HVAC + Master Medical Gas + State Fire Protection. Commercial + residential plumbing/HVAC.
Family-owned since 1934 in Olmos Park, San Antonio. Sea World, Botanical Gardens clients. 90+ years operating. Commercial + residential plumbing + HVAC.
Founded 2016 by John Thunert (25 yrs HVAC experience). Family-owned, Central/South TX. Residential + commercial.
Founded 1981 by Hal Lalime (President). Sandy Lalime, co-owner / Office Manager — 30 yrs tenure. Family-owned. Commercial HVAC + energy controls.
Founded 1981 by Randy Lange. Wife Jamie Lange continued for 17 yrs after Randy. Now owned by Jonathan Cramer (Sep 2023). Commercial mechanical + building automation. Greater Houston.
Celebrating 50 years (founded ~1974-75). Trane Comfort Specialist, BBB A+. Residential + commercial. Houston/The Woodlands. Independence inferred.

Founded by Jack Neva (former Carrier District Service Mgr, 25 yrs). Current President: Doug Neva (Jack's son, 40+ yrs). 40+ years operating. Petrochemical, refineries, hospitals, schools. Family-owned.

Family-owned 35+ yrs. 1000+ preventive maintenance service agreements per company statements. Greater Houston: Sugar Land, Katy, The Woodlands, League City. Commercial: offices, retail, restaurants, multi-tenant.

35+ yrs in Harris County. Commercial HVAC + sheet metal fab + building automation + plumbing + refrigeration. Privately held, not on acquisition lists. Founded year inferred from 35-yr experience claim (~1989).
Founded 1982. Owner: Donny Cannon (referenced in reviews). Family-built. Restaurants, schools, hospitals, retail, refineries, chemical plants. Licensed up to 350 tons. EPA cert, BBB accredited.
Founded 1991. President: Guy Mullen. Revenue $13.3M (2026). HVAC tenant finish + remodel + commercial service, NEBB testing/balancing. Greater Houston.
Founded 1955. Greater Houston full-service mechanical: plumbing, HVAC, building automation. Matt Ford, VP. Larger independent; commercial-industrial focus.

license_type: ACR Class A Commercial (building automation specialty)
independence_notes: Founded 1993 (originally Digital Air Control, rebranded DAC in 2015). Founder Pete still owner. Building automation, security access, TAB (test/adj/balance), life-cycle services. Independent.

Founded 1961 by Lee Thompson. Owner/President: Scott Thompson (son, 30+ yrs). 60+ yrs family-owned. Commercial + residential, package units, split, refrig, chillers, boilers, pneumatic+electronic controls.
Founded March 1967 by D.L. (Don) Garnier (one truck, home-based). Currently led by Greg Garnier (son). Family-owned 5 generations. Schools, institutional, medical, hotels, retail, industrial. BBB A+.
Family-owned by Josh and Felix Melendez. In industry since 1988; MB Mechanical, Inc. since 2005. Greater Houston, Spring, Humble, The Woodlands. Commercial + residential.
Family-owned since 2016. Owner: Ruben Garcia III. Greater Houston, commercial + residential.
Family-owned & operated 30+ yrs. Serves TX + OK + LA. Air purification, distribution design, mechanical heating/AC. Comfort specialty.

Mechanical contractor HVAC, plumbing, commercial service, industrial. Lab/clean room capable. NOT to be confused with Hugh M. Cunningham Companies (manufacturer's rep agency). Founded year unconfirmed; flag for re-verification.
Operating since 1987 per company. Family-owned. Greater Houston including Baytown, Bellaire, Humble, Pasadena. Commercial + residential + refrig + sheet metal.

Family-owned by Orlando and Jackie (founded 2017). New construction residential + custom + LIGHT commercial (office/warehouse, small gyms, restaurants). 12+ yrs experience pre-founding. Flag: light commercial only.
40+ years HVAC service experience in Houston. Bases in Spring and Pasadena. Partnered with Cother Inc. Family-feel operations, residential + commercial.

legal_name: Easco Air Conditioning and Heating, Inc.
independence_notes: Founded Jan 1984 by Clyde Tauriainen. Wife Alena and sons Joshua and Caleb work in business. Three locations. Commercial/industrial + residential HVAC, Conroe/Houston/N. Houston.
Operating since 1980. SE Texas focus (Beaumont, Nederland). Heavy industrial through residential. NATE certified, Energy Star, BBB A+. Independence inferred from no acquisition records.

Full-service HVAC + refrig contractor along Texas Coast (Beaumont, Houston, Corpus Christi). GM: Justin Aycock. Commercial AC, VRF, industrial HVAC, refrig, plumbing, kitchen equipment. Founded year unconfirmed.
Established 1983. Greater SE Texas. Commercial + industrial HVAC, plumbing, refrig, controls, site utility, 24-hr emergency. Industries: education, healthcare, hospitality, retail, govt.
Founded 1987. ~$10-25M revenue. ~11 employees. Houston bldg owners + property mgrs. AC/refrigeration + VFD/SCR for drilling, oilfield. Independent.
Serving Sugar Land, River Oaks, Bellaire since 1956. 50+ yrs Greater Houston. Carrier Factory Authorized Dealer. Residential + light commercial. Engineer: Scot Varnau, P.E.

Veteran-owned & operated. Commercial + industrial mechanical room diagnostics, repair, certification. Boilers, air handlers, lab AC, split systems, automation. Houston commercial focus. Founded year unconfirmed.
Privately owned/operated since 1984. Texas commercial, industrial, institutional. Offices in Houston, Dallas, Fort Worth, Austin. Multi-market but family-owned independent.
Owned & operated by Rosie and Juan Gloria. Founded 2003 (commercial ventilation, boiler, HVAC service/repair). Commercial HVAC + plumbing. DFW + Houston + SA. BBB A+. Independent.
Family-owned/operated since 1998. Owner: Bill Casey. Full-service commercial HVAC installation, Fort Worth. Independent.
Founded 1982 by Jim Pearson. Owner: Stacey Pearson (son, since 2012). 42+ yrs. Multi-Family Apartment Industry HVAC + commercial focus. Family-owned.
Founded 2005 by Mark Rutledge (P.E., owner/partner) and Maurice Kelley (production mgr/owner/partner). Both 30+ yrs experience. State-licensed mechanical. Texas + surrounding states.
Founded 2013. Owner: Mike Trevino Jr. 20-50 employees, $10-25M revenue. Commercial/industrial engineering.
Founded 1962. Industrial focus + plumbing + controls. Mansfield, DFW area. Independent.
Founded 1981. WBENC certified (woman-owned). North Texas commercial + residential. Clients incl. Turner Construction, Rogers-O'Brien, dealerships, distrib centers, retail, hospitals, education.
Founded 1968. Design-build/design-assist HVAC + plumbing. Dallas, Fort Worth (Benbrook), Corpus Christi. Mission-critical/complex commercial. RMP M-46427.
Founded April 1977. Owner: Chris Goolsby. Dallas commercial + residential. Originally specialized in commercial new construction HVAC.
Founded 1946 by Don Saffell. Owner: Doug Saffell (son, since 1984). Multi-generation family-owned. Residential + commercial; commercial remodel. Master Plumber.

Founded 2007. Owners: Mike Bell, James M. Bell (Managing Members) + Terri Bell (Manager). Family-owned. Lennox Premier Dealer. 450 yrs combined tech experience, 1000+ installs/yr. DFW + Baton Rouge + Gulfport.
Founded 1977. Commercial sheet metal + commercial HVAC + refrigeration. Denton County + DFW. In-house sheet metal shop, precision coil/duct fabrication.

legal_name: NTD Mechanical / North Texas Ductworks, LLC
independence_notes: Established May 2001. DFW commercial mechanical, HVAC/plumbing/piping/energy mgmt. WBE/SBE/DBE/HUB certified. 450+ projects in public works, aviation, govt, healthcare, education. Independent.
Since 1987. Big-box retailers, property managers, real estate owners. Carrollton DFW. Independent. License TACLA14326C verified.
Founded 1989 by Jamal Gharbieh, P.E. Second-generation family-owned. Jamal (President/Owner), Mohammad Gharbieh (VP), Zak Gharbieh (President). DFW commercial + residential.

Founded 2009 by John Smith (President/Founder). 150+ staff. One of largest HVAC contractors in Texas. In-house engineering. Statewide. NOT to be confused with Ambient Enterprises' 'DMG HVAC' (California). Texas DMG is independent.
Family + Veteran-owned/operated. Owned by Ricky Cox and Tiffany Cox, DVM. Fort Worth. Commercial + residential AC/heating/refrig. Star-Telegram Best Heat and Air 2017, 2018.

legal_name: Pessin Holdings, Inc. dba Generations HVAC
independence_notes: Family-owned by Nicky (President) and Eddie (VP) Pessin since 2007. License TACLA27594C. Texas commercial construction + service HVAC. ~$3M revenue.
Family-owned by Matt and Ashly Dunn. 26+ yrs HVAC. Austin commercial: restaurants, medical, multi-family. Exposed ductwork, hydronic, commercial kitchen hoods, ERV. License 29654C.

legal_name: Air Craft, Inc. / Consolidated Metal Technologies, Inc.
independence_notes: In business since 1995, Round Rock. $100M+ commercial HVAC projects past decade. Commercial construction + service + building automation. Austin metro. BBB Accredited 2014. Independent.
Owner: Mike Creamer (HVAC + B.S. Business). 30+ yrs Greater Austin commercial. Past President + current Treasurer Austin ACCA chapter.
LLC formed 2015 (started 9/2013). Managing Member: Craig Stark. License TACLA56268E. Georgetown/Williamson Co. design-build commercial + residential, Central TX.
25+ yrs locally-owned (~1999). Largest local commercial MEP in Cedar Park/Round Rock/Georgetown. Cedar Park, Austin, Georgetown, Round Rock, Pflugerville, Lakeway, Leander. Family-owned.
Founded 2015 by Mark Scarborough (Taylor native). Family-owned. Commercial + new construction; clients incl. Yates Construction, Pulte, Embree, EBCO, Allen Group.
Family-owned, founded 2017 by Ereli Jaramillo. License #140716. Central TX commercial refrigeration + large-scale HVAC: schools, offices, multifamily.
Family-owned since 2009. Del Valle/Red Rock-based. New construction multi-family + commercial + residential. Austin, SA, Houston, Dallas service. Independent.
Operating since 2004. General contracting + HVAC mechanical services. Big-box retail (Lowes, Home Depot, Walmart/Sams) work. Liberty Hill, Williamson Co.

BIM/VDC specialty for HVAC + plumbing trades. Design + engineering + construction phases. Austin. NOTE: not a service contractor with trucks; included as commercial HVAC ecosystem player. Flag for scoring (no field service).
Independent controls contractor since 2011. Distech Controls + Tridium Niagara authorized. State/local govt, school districts, universities, aerospace, semiconductor, hotels. Independent.

Founded 2000 in Houston. Family-named (Jeff Kilgore, Kenneth Kilgore Jr.). MEP: mechanical, electrical (TECL26749), plumbing (M-37953). Custom metal + pipe fabrication. Aviation, healthcare, multifamily, education, govt, mission-critical. Larger independent — flag for scoring.
Woman-owned & family-operated. Owner: Donice Hartman (B.S. Math, 30 yrs industrial equipment sales). VP: Daniel Hartman. Founded April 2023. Commercial + residential, Conroe. Flag: young company.

Family-owned/operated 20+ yrs. NOTE: LEX East Texas branding suggests possible related/affiliated entity (e.g., 'Lex Cooling' which appears on PrivSource Texas HVAC acquisition list). Flag for verification of independence/PE status before any outreach. Tentatively included.
Three generations of family since 1978. BBB A+, Carrier President's Award winner. McKinney, Frisco, Allen, Plano, Prosper, Celina, Lucas, Fairview, Princeton. Family-owned.
~50 yrs (since ~1976). Frisco, Plano, Carrollton, N. Dallas. BBB A+. Family-feel multi-generation. Commercial + residential.

legal_name: Golden Rule Air Conditioning & Heating, LLC
independence_notes: Founded 2007. Owner/President: James Miller; Office Manager: Kym Miller. Houston-based, full-service mechanical contractor for residential, commercial, new construction. Family-operated.
Founded 2016 by Steve Finley and Ryan Snider (combined 25+ yrs). Trane Certified Comfort Specialist. Houston commercial new construction + retail + residential. NATE certified.
Houston Greater Houston commercial mechanical contractor. Founded year unconfirmed (website SSL cert expired at time of fetch). Independent.
HVAC license: Josh Harris (TACLA000045915C); Plumbing: Bryan O'Neal (MPL38947). Healthcare, commercial offices, retail, govt, education, industrial. Houston. Founded year unconfirmed.
Founded April 14, 1974. Three generations family-owned. 42+ yrs AC, heating, refrigeration. Houston commercial + residential.

Founded 1962 by Houk family. ~$30M revenue, 200+ employees. NEW HQ in Grand Prairie (2024). NOTE: 'Natalia Gawlik v. Houk Air Conditioning, Inc., SE Acquisition Sub' Texas court filing suggests possible recent acquisition/ownership change. FLAG for verification before any outreach. Tentatively included; treat as independence_unverified.
Tyler, East TX industrial HVAC + boiler replacements + 500-ton chillers/cooling towers/pumps. Independent. Founded year unconfirmed.
Founded 2013. Waco/Central TX. Residential + commercial AC + heating. Award-winning per company. Independent.
60+ years commercial HVAC. Waco area. Founded year unconfirmed via web. Flag for verification.
Family-owned/operated Austin HVAC. Residential + commercial. AC, heating repair + install + preventative maintenance + emergency service. Limited public info — flag for verification.

legal_name: Crow Brothers Heating & Air Conditioning, LLC
independence_notes: Veteran + family-owned. Waco, Bellmead, Hewitt, West, Robinson, Mexia, Mart, Coolidge, Hubbard, Axtell, Groesbeck, Central TX. Commercial + residential. Founded year unconfirmed.
